metadata.description: A woman in her 60s with warm medium-deep skin tone and visible fine lines across her forehead and around her eyes. Her face is an oval shape with a softly defined jawline. Her hair is a striking mix of dark gray and white, styled in voluminous, tight curls that reach past her shoulders, with a natural hairline. Her eyes are a light, vivid blue, almond-shaped, and set widely apart. Her eyebrows are medium-thick and naturally arched. Her nose has a broad bridge and a rounded tip. Her lips are medium-full with a well-defined cupid's bow. She has a composed, direct expression, with her head angled slightly to the left.
metadata.anchor: Woman with voluminous gray curls and vivid blue eyes.
